name: Fashion Odyssey Country2country
author: Poki
description: In Fashion Odyssey Country2Country, you’re off on a globe-trotting style adventure! Say goodbye to boring outfits and hello to magical, eye-catching looks inspired by each place you visit. Get creative with dreamy, romantic, and mysterious vibes as you mix and match wild makeup and fabulous clothes to make your own unique style. Ready to travel the world and look amazing doing it? How to play Fashion Odyssey Country2country? Click select color and items. Who created Fashion Odyssey Country2country? Fashion Odyssey Country2country is created by CGSpot. This is their first game on Poki! How can I play Fashion Odyssey Country2country for free? You can play Fashion Odyssey Country2country for free on Poki. Can I play Fashion Odyssey Country2country on mobile devices and desktop? Fashion Odyssey Country2country can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
